headline: Is There Now An Opportunity In Bank Of America (BAC) After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Bank of America shares still offer value at around US$46.72, you are not alone. Many investors are trying to work out if the current price fairly reflects the bank's long term prospects. The stock has seen mixed returns, with a 3.9% decline over the last 7 days and an 11.1% decline over the last 30 days, but a 16.8% return over 1 year, 81.5% over 3 years and 36.9% over 5 years. Recent headlines around large U.S. banks, including Bank of America, have focused on...

headline: Warren Buffett returned 6,000,000% plus for investors over 60 years. Here are his 5 biggest wins and what to learn
summary: The Oracle of Omaha just retired after six decades running Berkshire Hathaway — turning $9,800 into a $150 billion personal fortune that crushed the S&P 500 by 130x.
